case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR'S VS. NATHAN OLSON

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLSON, NATHAN
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-18-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-05-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NATHAN OLSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
